title: Platform settings
description: Global SaaS settings that apply to every clinic.

intro.title: In-app assistant control
intro.body: Set how many messages each user can send to the AI assistant per day. This protects OpenAI token usage across all clinics.

assistant.title: In-app AI assistant
assistant.description: Daily message cap per user (help + read-only lookups).

fields.daily_limit_hint: Between 1 and 1000. Resets at midnight (app timezone). Recommended default: 40.

footer.never_updated: No global configuration has been saved yet.
